raw.official description: Shield Bash grants 30% movement speed for 1.5 seconds and bashing an enemy restores 100 Barrier health.
Melee attacks reduce the cooldown of Repair Pack by 0.75 seconds.
raw.ability details: * Each enemy hero hit by a Rocket Flail attack grants cooldown reduction. Whip Shot hits do not count. * [[Deployable]]s hit do not grant cooldown reduction, except [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]].

abilities.name: Inspire
shot_type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Dealing damage to enemies heals nearby allies.
raw.heal: 15 per second
raw.ability details:
* Triggered by [[Rocket Flail]], [[Whip Shot]], or [[Shield Bash]].
* If triggered, there is a 1 second cooldown before it can be triggered again by [[Rocket Flail]], but can be instantly triggered by [[Whip Shot]], or [[Shield Bash]].
** Note that 1 second is longer than the rate of fire (0.6 seconds) for [[Rocket Flail]], meaning that when spamming Flail, not every hit will trigger Inspire.
* Does not stack with itself. Instead, the duration resets.
* The Inspire effect generates a pulse that applies a heal-over-time status effect to allies in range. '"`UNIQ--ref-0000005B-QINU`"'
** This includes a subtle visible yellow pulse effect.
** Does not apply to allies behind enemy barriers or surfaces that block line of sight.
** The pulse is centered around a fixed location where Brigitte was when she dealt damage, and does not move with her.
** When the pulse hits an ally, they gain the heal-over-time effect, and will continue healing them after they leave the inspire range.
** This effect is similar to Baptise's [[Regenerative Burst]], and unlike Lucio's [[Crossfade]] aura.
* Does not trigger from hitting most non-enemy targets such as Symmetra's [[Sentry Turret]]. However, it can be triggered by hitting Wrecking Ball's [[Minefield]].
* [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]] counts as an enemy and can also be hit to trigger Inspire.

heal.raw: 15 per second

raw.official description: Shield Bash grants 30% increased movement speed for 2 seconds. Inspire's healing is instant when activated by Shield Bash.
raw.ability details: * Shield Bash hits no longer reset the duration of an active Inspire when this perk is selected. * Only triggers once regardless of how many enemies were hit by Shield Bash during [[File:Rally.png|sub|link=Brigitte#Rally|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Brigitte#Rally|Rally]]. *Heals 60 for allies within inspire's range

Attempting to use it will swing the Rocket Flail instead. * Rocket Flail is not reflected when blocked by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]].

raw.official description: Available when Barrier Shield is deployed. Dash forward to knock back an enemy.
raw.ability details: * If Shield Bash collides with [[File:Rocket_punch.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Rocket Punch|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Rocket Punch|Rocket Punch]], [[File:Ability-reinhardt3.png|sub|link=Reinhardt#Charge|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reinhardt#Charge|Charge]], a charging [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]], or another ''Could not find 'Shield Bash' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'', both participants get [[Crowd Control#Knock Down|knocked down]] for 1.7 seconds. * During ''Could not find 'Rally' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'', Shield Bash impacts multiple enemies and stuns all enemies hit for 0.5 seconds. * If multiple Repair Packs are thrown at the same target, the healing duration is simply increased by 2 seconds. * The dash is not stopped by fences or other breakables in its path, but destroys them as it passes through. * Shield Bash's [[movement speed]] buff does not count towards global movement speed buff cap.

raw.official description: Hold [[File:Key mouse 2.png|20x20px|link=]] to deploy a frontal energy barrier.
raw.ability details: * Barrier health regenerates at a rate of 85 per second after being retracted for 2 seconds. * The shield is in the shape of a vertical rectangle curving in at the bottom sides. * Barrier Shield's orientation can be changed by moving the mouse. * During ''Could not find 'Rally' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'', the barrier's health and size are increased.

abilities.name: Rally
shot_type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Gain armor, empower Barrier Shield and provide extra health to nearby allies.
raw.ability details: * [[Overhealth]] per second: 30 on allies * Overhealth lasts up to 30 seconds, even if the ally leaves its radius or Brigitte is eliminated. ** The timer starts when the ally first receives overhealth from Rally. However, if the ally loses all overhealth from the Rally, the timer will start over when they start gaining it again. ** At the end of the timer, overhealth starts to decay quickly. * During Rally, Brigitte's barrier abilities are enhanced: ** [[File:Barrier Shield.png|sub|link=Brigitte#Barrier Shield|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Brigitte#Barrier Shield|Barrier Shield]] becomes wider and its current and maximum health is increased to 700. ** [[File:Shield Bash.png|sub|link=Brigitte#Shield Bash|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Brigitte#Shield Bash|Shield Bash]] impacts multiple enemies and stuns all enemies hit for 0.75 seconds. * Rally can be activated any time, interrupting Brigitte's primary fire and any ability she is currently using. * Activating Rally resets the cooldown of [[File:Shield Bash.png|sub|link=Brigitte#Shield Bash|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Brigitte#Shield Bash|Shield Bash]] and restores the shield even if it was destroyed. * When activated, Brigitte instantly gains movement speed and additional [[armor]] on top of her current health pool for the duration of Rally. ** This armor can be restored by healing, but it does not regenerate by itself. ** Brigitte herself does not gain overhealth over time. ** Rally's [[movement speed]] buff does not count towards global movement speed buff cap.
